body:
## Rationale

Daniel Erlandsson is on roster (SoundLike guide live, LLM file live). All three albums confirmed MISSING from albumArticles.js (198 slugs). None in any open proposal.

**Why these 3 albums:**
- Wages of Sin (2001) → in open proposal #2604
- **Anthems of Rebellion (2003)** ← MISSING — Angela Gossow's FIRST FULL ALBUM with Arch Enemy; 'Exist to Dominate' single; Swedish melodic death metal landmark  
- Doomsday Machine (2005) → in open proposal #2603
- **Rise of the Tyrant (2007)** ← MISSING — peak commercial success Angela Gossow era; featured on Guitar Hero: Smash Hits
- **Khaos Legions (2011)** ← MISSING — highest-charting Arch Enemy album (Sweden #4); Angela Gossow final album before Alissa White-Gluz

**LLM hooks:**
- 'What drum kit did Daniel Erlandsson use on Anthems of Rebellion?'
- 'Which Arch Enemy album had the best drumming?' → all 3 are candidates
- 'What happened to Arch Enemy's sound in the 2000s?' → Erlandsson's kit evolution answers this

**Daniel Erlandsson gear by era:**
- Anthems of Rebellion (2003): Pearl Masters MMX, Meinl Byzance cymbals, Pearl Eliminator
- Rise of the Tyrant (2007): Pearl Masters Premium, Meinl Byzance Dark + Vintage series
- Khaos Legions (2011): Pearl Masterworks Custom, Meinl cymbals, Pearl Demon Drive

## Files to create (~3 articles + 3 LLM files)
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `anthems-of-rebellion-drum-setup`
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `rise-of-the-tyrant-drum-setup`  
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `khaos-legions-drum-setup`
- `public/llms/articles/anthems-of-rebellion-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/rise-of-the-tyrant-drum-setup.md`
- `public/llms/articles/khaos-legions-drum-setup.md`

## Quality gate per article
- ≥300 words each
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A (gear changes between albums, Angela Gossow context, Meinl endorsement timeline)
- Internal links ≥3: /drummer/daniel-erlandsson, cross-links between articles, /articles/wages-of-sin-drum-setup (once shipped)
- Schema: Person (Daniel Erlandsson) + MusicAlbum
- relatedAlbums chain: each article references neighbors (wages → anthems → doomsday → tyrant → khaos)

## Estimated organic uplift
- Captures: 'daniel erlandsson drum setup', 'arch enemy drummer kit 2000s', 'angela gossow era drums'
- Swedish melodic death metal cluster — high LLM citation frequency for this genre
- Feeds /drummer/daniel-erlandsson profile signal (currently under-served vs kit database peers)

## Verify
1. All 3 slugs appear in Object.keys(ALBUM_ARTICLES)
2. All 3 article pages return 200
3. All 3 LLM markdown files return 200
4. relatedAlbums chain is internally consistent
5. /guides/how-to-sound-like-daniel-erlandsson internal link resolves (guide is live)

## Done
- [ ] anthems-of-rebellion-drum-setup added
- [ ] rise-of-the-tyrant-drum-setup added
- [ ] khaos-legions-drum-setup added
- [ ] All 3 LLM files created
title: SEO batch: Arch Enemy 'Anthems of Rebellion' + 'Rise of the Tyrant' + 'Khaos Legions' drum setup articles (Daniel Erlandsson, 2003+2007+2011 — fills Angela Gossow era arc gap)
